description_long: This is a stylized adult female character with a slim build, standing with arms slightly outstretched. She has short, side-parted hair and wears a headset with a microphone. Her outfit consists of a cropped, fitted top with shoulder pads, fingerless gloves, and high-waisted shorts that reveal detailed leg tattoos. She is equipped with knee-high boots and has various accessories, including a belt pouch and cables attached to her clothing. The character's attire and accessories suggest a modern, possibly futuristic urban setting, and her confident stance and expressive face add personality.
description: A slim adult female with short hair, headset, cropped top, shorts, boots, and visible tattoos, styled for a modern urban environment.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, headset, cropped top, gloves, shorts, tattoos, and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, headset, arm, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the head, shoulder pads, belt pouch, shorts, and leg tattoos.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, headset, arm, and the side of the boots and shorts.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted cropped top with shoulder pads, high-waisted shorts, fingerless gloves, and knee-high boots with utility accessories
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
